name: gate arrival: a guest arriving days before their booking's check-in date is told the real date and assigned no room (B9/F17)
comment: Observed live during B8 device testing — a guest sent '1 - I'm at the gate' two days before their booking started and was checked into a room they had not booked for that night, silently taking it out of inventory. The check is SAST day-granularity and deliberately one-sided: only a FUTURE check-in is refused. A guest who is LATE is still a guest, and turning them away at the gate would be worse than the bug being fixed. Day granularity also protects the guest who booked 'today' at 23:30 and reaches the gate at 00:30, now technically the next SAST day. No writes at all: the booking stays Confirmed and the guest can simply arrive on the right day.
